name: scifunc_block_m
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="scifunc_block_m" blockType="c" dependsOnU="1" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="scifunc" simulationFunctionType="TYPE_3" style="scifunc_block_m">
        <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="320.0" y="180.0" width="80.0" height="40.0" />
        <Array as="exprs" scilabClass="ScilabList">
          <ScilabString height="9" width="1">
            <data line="0" column="0" value="[1,1]" />
            <data line="1" column="0" value="[1,1]" />
            <data line="2" column="0" value="[]" />
            <data line="3" column="0" value="[]" />
            <data line="4" column="0" value="[]" />
            <data line="5" column="0" value="[]" />
            <data line="6" column="0" value="[]" />
            <data line="7" column="0" value="[]" />
            <data line="8" column="0" value="0" />
          </ScilabString>
          <Array scilabClass="ScilabList">
            <ScilabString height="1" width="1">
              <data line="0" column="0" value="y1=sin(u1)" />
            </ScilabString>
            <ScilabString height="1" width="1">
              <data line="0" column="0" value="xd=[]" />
            </ScilabString>
            <ScilabString height="1" width="1">
              <data line="0" column="0" value=" " />
            </ScilabString>
            <ScilabString height="1" width="1">
              <data line="0" column="0" value=" " />
            </ScilabString>
            <ScilabString height="1" width="1">
              <data line="0" column="0" value=" " />
            </ScilabString>
            <ScilabString height="1" width="1">
              <data line="0" column="0" value=" " />
            </ScilabString>
            <ScilabString height="2" width="1">
              <data line="0" column="0" value=" " />
              <data line="1" column="0" value="y1=[]" />
            </ScilabString>
          </Array>
        </Array>
        <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="0" width="0" />
        <ScilabInteger as="integerParameters" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
          <data line="0" column="0" value="0" />
        </ScilabInteger>
        <Array as="objectsParameters" scilabClass="ScilabList">
          <ScilabString height="1" width="1"><data line="0" column="0" value="y1=sin(u1)"/></ScilabString>
          <ScilabString height="1" width="1"><data line="0" column="0" value="xd=[]"/></ScilabString>
          <ScilabString height="1" width="1"><data line="0" column="0" value=" "/></ScilabString>
          <ScilabString height="1" width="1"><data line="0" column="0" value=" "/></ScilabString>
          <ScilabString height="1" width="1"><data line="0" column="0" value=" "/></ScilabString>
          <ScilabString height="1" width="1"><data line="0" column="0" value=" "/></ScilabString>
          <ScilabString height="2" width="1">
            <data line="0" column="0" value=" "/>
            <data line="1" column="0" value="y1=[]"/>
          </ScilabString>
        </Array>
        <ScilabInteger as="nbZerosCrossing" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
          <data line="0" column="0" value="0" />
        </ScilabInteger>
        <ScilabInteger as="nmode" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
          <data line="0" column="0" value="0" />
        </ScilabInteger>
        <ScilabDouble as="state" height="0" width="0" />
        <ScilabDouble as="dState" height="0" width="0" />
        <Array as="oDState" scilabClass="ScilabList" />
        <Array as="equations" scilabClass="ScilabList" />
      </BasicBlock>
criticalRules: Preserve exact port styles from reference
objectsParameters MUST BE POPULATED with the SAME ScilabStrings as the function body Array in exprs (NOT an empty Array).
Second body string must be 'xd=[]' (not a space). Last ScilabString must have TWO lines: line 0=' ', line 1='y1=[]'.
Use y1=%e^(u1) for exponential equations (NOT y1=exp(u1)).
